info.name: Zinda Learn API Collection
info.description: Automatically compiled collection of all MERN LMS REST endpoints.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Student and Tutor session credentials and profile settings operations.

request.description: Creates a new user profile with student or instructor roles.
Authenticate using email and password to receive a JWT.
Log in or sign up using Google credentials/token.
Dispatches a login/verification OTP to the user's registered email.
Validates an OTP sent to the user email for password recovery or login.
Returns details about the currently authenticated user session.
Modify bio, name, social links, or phone number of current user.
Updates current user password by validating the old password.

item.name: Students
item.description: Student activities, certificates, progress trackers, and settings.

request.description: Performs operation on /api/student/progress/overview using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/progress/courses using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/progress/analytics using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/progress/activity using GET method.

item.name: Teachers
item.description: Instructor specific payouts, stats, profile modifications, and settings.

request.description: Retrieve previous instructor withdrawal distributions.
Submit a request to withdraw earned course points to bank/UPI accounts.
Retrieve reviews with user reference detailed info.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/settings using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/profile using PUT method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/avatar using PUT method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/change-password using PUT method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/request-email-change using POST method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/verify-email-otp using POST method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/logout-all using POST method.
Fetch courses created by the authenticated instructor.
Fetches total course sales, enrollment count, ratings, and revenue logs.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/students using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/course using POST method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/course/:id using PUT method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/course/:id using DELETE method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/support/tickets using POST method.
Performs operation on /api/instructor/support/tickets using GET method.

item.name: Courses
item.description: Curriculum creation, sections listing, and reviews comments.

request.description: Retrieve reviews with user reference detailed info.
Submit a review rating and text comment.
Update pricing, syllabus, cover thumbnails, or structure.
Remove course from index listings (Admin/Creator only).
Update pricing, syllabus, cover thumbnails, or structure.
Submit a review rating and text comment.
Adds a course module section (Instructor/Admin only).
Adjust positions of sections or lessons by list indices.
Update pricing, syllabus, cover thumbnails, or structure.
Remove course from index listings (Admin/Creator only).
Adds a course module section (Instructor/Admin only).
Update pricing, syllabus, cover thumbnails, or structure.
Remove course from index listings (Admin/Creator only).
Adds a course module section (Instructor/Admin only).
Reply to a student query or modify existing query text.
Submit a review rating and text comment.
Fetches list of published courses with pagination and category search filtering.
Fetch full curriculum modules and details of a single course.
Initialize a course outline (title, summary, price, category).
Update pricing, syllabus, cover thumbnails, or structure.
Remove course from index listings (Admin/Creator only).
Change status to pending to request admin approval.

item.name: Enrollments
item.description: Student courses enrollment history and progress updates.

request.description: Retrieve list of user course subscriptions and progress metrics.
Mark lessons as completed and track video timestamp parameters.
Fetches total course sales, enrollment count, ratings, and revenue logs.
Directly enroll into free courses or process enrollment confirmations.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Razorpay and withdrawal order transactions details.

request.description: Generates a signed Razorpay Order payload structure.
Validate checkout hashes to finalize subscriber enrollment.
Performs operation on /api/student/certificates/stats using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/certificates/ using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/certificates/featured using GET method.
Performs operation on /api/student/certificates/skills using GET method.
Retrieve all message conversation threads for the user.
List all students/teachers available to message.
Performs operation on /api/messages/:conversationId using GET method.

Dispatches a chat message to a conversation user.
Enables teachers to broadcast announcements to all course students.

Performs operation on /api/notifications/mark-all-read using PATCH method.
